name: create-atlas
description: Create a new Atlas text-to-SQL agent project

scripts.prepublishOnly: test -f ../docs/deploy.md || (echo 'ERROR: docs/deploy.md not found in repo root. Cannot build template.' && exit 1) && rm -rf ./template/src ./template/bin ./template/data ./template/docs && cp -r ../src ./template/src && cp -r ../bin ./template/bin && cp -r ../data ./template/data && mkdir -p ./template/docs && cp ../docs/deploy.md ./template/docs/deploy.md
